title: Duck's Mythical Adventures
description: Duck's Mythical Adventures is a magic and RPG-based mod pack that adds new weapons and spells alongside races.
body:
# Duck's Mythical Adventures



What Is Duck's Mythical Adventures? Duck's Mythical Adventures is a modpack with magic and other cool mods for the main purposes of an RPG-type modpack some cool things this modpack adds are races and cool animals and this modpack has 270+ mods.


## Origins By Apace

Origins is a mod in which you can pick your origin/race but if this modpack you can choose more than 9 origins you can select 20 origins thanks to magic origins! All of them are Mimmic Panda Pirate Necromancer  Cyborg  Undead Yin & Yang Green Dragon. Druid Magical Fly Superior Dwarf Kraken  Red Dragon Lorax. Hydra etc.

![Magical Fly Origin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c39bb63477b7d4d8f127073a3e65713a6699b8d.png)
![Mage Origin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/176e7f2f45d8270bf7183978e678002885ab21f7.png)
![The Kraken Origin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93dc2f75dffdb7e169fb033bbd6719962973e4ad.png)


## Better Archeology By Pandarix, Dunk3ll1cht

Better Archeology adds artifacts & fossils you can find in new structures around the map this mod adds new totems of undying their type of buffs that can be useful for some not only you can find fossils in the new biomes made for them! To find them you must first craft a brush and look for their custom biome or structures locate them, identify them, and make a Museum if you want, all of the fossils and artifacts you find!

![Better Archeology Part 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29f7e4096e11a6202c0a5402eecb6a90be8bc3eb.png)
![Better Archeology Part 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa57be76564f27b8db34d8bea0b2554571e01391.png)


## Tide by Lightning64

Tide is a better fishing mod in which you can discover new fish, make better fishing rods learn about 30+ new fishes, and get different types of bait to get different types of fish!
![New Fishing Rods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe673c1671c1f99f76bc810086d6d5608892ef6.png)
![New Fish Part 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0286fe6c3491776deed9c189e2837b44da37e837.png)
![New Fish Part 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d741404a7b0c15949471c6f2947a34a2d6e5bba5.png)


## Quick Summary
Duck's Mythical Adventures is a magic and RPG-based mod pack that adds new weapons and spells alongside races, Discover new Biomes learn about the past, find out more about yourself and your magic and past, and have fun if friends using Cloudflare


## Credit and copyright info
Thanks to every creator of the mods inside this mod pack if it weren't for them we wouldn't have any mods to use copyright You can only give links to my mod packs and mods but you can't make a profit noir says it's your's
